subcodes.first_line: O friends of the All-Merciful! The Abhá Beauty hath raised the pavilion of eternal glory at the pole of contingent being, and all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان حضرت رحمن جمال ابهی در قطب امکان خیمه عزت ابدیه برافراخت و جمیع
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @suffering and imprisonment, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
